themes.name: 2. Shadcn UI 纵向对半分栏 (Vertical Stack)
themes.css: body.theme2 { background-color: #09090b; color: #fafafa; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .theme2 .vps-card { flex-direction: column !important; background-color: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); color: #fafafa; transition: border-color 0.2s, background-color 0.2s; } .theme2 .vps-card:hover { border-color: #52525b; background-color: #18181b; transform: none; } .theme2 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a; padding-bottom: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .theme2 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; } .theme2 .group-header { border-left: none; color: #fafafa; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0; margin: 1.5rem 0 1rem 0; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .theme2 .card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; color: #fafafa; } .theme2 .stat-header { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; } .theme2 .stat-bar-full { background-color: #27272a; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; } .theme2 .stat-bar-full > div { background-color: #fafafa !important; border-radius: 9999px; } .theme2 .stat-subtext, .theme2 .card-meta { color: #a1a1aa; font-size: 0.75rem; } .theme2 .badge { background-color: #27272a; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #3f3f46; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; } .theme2 .global-stats { padding: 1.5rem; background-color: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 0.5rem; } .theme2 .g-val { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fafafa; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .theme2 .g-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; } .theme2 .stats-row .g-item, .theme2 .stats-row.bottom-row { border-color: #27272a; } .theme2 .custom-table { background-color: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: #fafafa; } .theme2 .custom-table th { background-color: #09090b; color: #a1a1aa; border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a; } .theme2 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a; } .theme2 .custom-table tr:hover { background-color: #18181b; } .theme2 .filter-tag { background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; color: #a1a1aa; border-radius: 0.375rem; } .theme2 .filter-tag.active { background: #fafafa; color: #09090b; border-color: #fafafa; } .theme2 .view-controls { background: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 0.5rem; } .theme2 .toggle-btn { color: #a1a1aa; border-radius: 0.375rem; } .theme2 .toggle-btn.active { background: #27272a; color: #fafafa; box-shadow: none; border: none; } body.theme2 #map-container { background-color: #09090b; border: 1px solid #27272a; }

themes.name: 3. 新粗野主义 上状态下数据 (Upside Down)
themes.css: body.theme3 { background-color: #fef08a; color: #000; font-weight: 500; } .theme3 .vps-card { flex-direction: column-reverse !important; background: #fff; border: 3px solid #000; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #000; transition: transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.1s; } .theme3 .vps-card:hover { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px #000; border-color: #000; } .theme3 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; border-top: 3px solid #000; padding-top: 12px; margin-top: 12px; } .theme3 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; } .theme3 .group-header { color: #000; border-left: none; border-bottom: 4px solid #000; padding-left: 0; display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; } .theme3 .stat-bar, .theme3 .stat-bar-full { background: #e5e5e5; border: 1px solid #000; } .theme3 .stat-bar > div, .theme3 .stat-bar-full > div { border-right: 1px solid #000; background-color: #3b82f6 !important; } .theme3 .badge { border: 1px solid #000; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px #000; } .theme3 .stat-val, .theme3 .g-val, .theme3 .card-title { font-weight: 900; color: #000; } .theme3 .custom-table, .theme3 .filter-tag, .theme3 .view-controls { background: #fff; border: 3px solid #000; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px #000; } .theme3 .filter-tag.active, .theme3 .toggle-btn.active { background: #000; color: #fff; } .theme3 #map-container { border: 3px solid #000; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #000; border-radius: 0; }

themes.name: 4. Apple Bento 镜像对调 (Left-Right Mirror)
themes.css: body.theme4 { background-color: #f5f5f7; color: #1d1d1f; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; } .theme4 .vps-card { flex-direction: row-reverse !important; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); padding: 24px; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.4s ease; } .theme4 .vps-card:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .theme4 .card-left { flex: 0 0 180px !important; border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05) !important; padding-left: 15px !important; } .theme4 .card-right { flex: 1 !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; padding-right: 15px !important; } .theme4 .group-header { border-left: none; color: #1d1d1f; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; padding: 0; margin: 32px 0 16px 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .theme4 .card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1d1d1f; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .theme4 .stat-header { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #86868b; } .theme4 .stat-bar-full { height: 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: #e5e5ea; } .theme4 .stat-bar-full > div { border-radius: 8px; } .theme4 .stat-subtext, .theme4 .card-meta { color: #86868b; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .theme4 .badge { background: #f5f5f7; color: #1d1d1f; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 11px; } .theme4 .global-stats { padding: 32px; border-radius: 32px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .theme4 .g-val { font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: #1d1d1f; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .theme4 .g-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #86868b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .theme4 .stats-row .g-item { border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .theme4 .custom-table { border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .theme4 .custom-table th { background: #f5f5f7; font-weight: 600; color: #1d1d1f; border-bottom: none; } .theme4 .filter-tag, .theme4 .view-controls { background: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .theme4 .filter-tag.active, .theme4 .toggle-btn.active { background: #0071e3; color: #fff; }

themes.name: 5. 赛博霓虹 悬浮看板 (Absolute Floating Header)
themes.css: body.theme5 { background-color: #050505; color: #0ff; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; } .theme5 .vps-card { position: relative !important; padding-top: 55px !important; display: block !important; background: #0b0c10; border: 1px solid #f0f; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.2); color: #fff; } .theme5 .vps-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5); border-color: #0ff; } .theme5 .card-left { width: 100% !important; margin-bottom: 10px; } .theme5 .card-title { position: absolute !important; top: 12px !important; left: 15px !important; width: calc(100% - 30px); border-bottom: 1px dashed #f0f; padding-bottom: 6px; } .theme5 .card-right { width: 100% !important; border-left: none !important; padding-left: 0 !important; } .theme5 .group-header { color: #f0f; border-left: 5px solid #0ff; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #f0f; font-weight: bold; } .theme5 .stat-val, .theme5 .g-val, .theme5 .card-title { color: #0ff; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #0ff; } .theme5 .stat-label, .theme5 .g-label, .theme5 .g-sub, .theme5 .card-meta { color: #f0f; } .theme5 .stat-bar, .theme5 .stat-bar-full { background: #222; border: 1px solid #f0f; border-radius: 0; } .theme5 .stat-bar > div, .theme5 .stat-bar-full > div { background: #0ff !important; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #0ff; border-radius: 0; } .theme5 .badge-bw { background: #f0f; box-shadow: 0 0 5px #f0f; } .theme5 .badge-tf { background: #0ff; color:#000; box-shadow: 0 0 5px #0ff; } .theme5 .custom-table, .theme5 .filter-tag, .theme5 .view-controls { background: #0b0c10; border: 1px solid #f0f; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.2); color: #fff; } .theme5 .custom-table th { background: #111; color: #f0f; border-color: #333; } .theme5 .custom-table td { border-color: #333; } .theme5 .custom-table tr:hover { background: #222; } body.theme5 #map-container { background-color: #050505; border: 1px solid #0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 0; } .theme5 .stat-subtext { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); } .theme5 .stats-row .g-item, .theme5 .stats-row.bottom-row { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .theme5 .toggle-btn.active, .theme5 .filter-tag.active { background: #0ff; color: #000; border-color: #0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #0ff; }

themes.name: 6. 黑客终端 纯网格平铺 (CSS Grid Deconstruction)
themes.css: body.theme6 { background-color: #000; color: #0f0; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; text-transform: uppercase; } body.theme6::after { content: ' '; display: block; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0; right: 0; background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); z-index: 2; background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; pointer-events: none; } .theme6 .vps-card { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important; gap: 15px !important; background: transparent; border: 1px dashed #0f0; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: none; color: #0f0; transition: background 0.1s; position: relative; z-index: 3; } .theme6 .vps-card:hover { background: #001100; border: 1px solid #0f0; } .theme6 .card-left, .theme6 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: auto !important; border: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } .theme6 .group-header { color: #0f0; border-left: none; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #0f0; margin-top: 30px; font-weight: bold; } .theme6 .group-header::before { content: '>_ '; animation: blink 1s infinite; } @keyframes blink { 0%, 49% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } } .theme6 .stat-bar-full { background: #000; border: 1px solid #0f0; height: 12px; border-radius: 0; } .theme6 .stat-bar-full > div { background: #0f0 !important; border-radius: 0; } .theme6 .card-title, .theme6 .stat-val, .theme6 .g-val { color: #0f0; font-weight: bold; text-shadow: 0 0 4px #0f0; } .theme6 .stat-label, .theme6 .g-label, .theme6 .g-sub, .theme6 .card-meta, .theme6 .stat-subtext, .theme6 .os-text { color: #0a0; } .theme6 .badge { background: #000; color: #0f0; border: 1px solid #0f0; border-radius: 0; } .theme6 .status-dot { border-radius: 0; width: 10px; height: 10px; box-shadow: 0 0 5px currentColor; } .theme6 .custom-table, .theme6 .filter-tag, .theme6 .view-controls { background: #000; border: 1px solid #0f0; color: #0f0; border-radius: 0; position: relative; z-index: 3; } .theme6 .custom-table th, .theme6 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px dashed #0f0; color: #0f0; background: transparent; } .theme6 .toggle-btn { color: #0a0; } .theme6 .toggle-btn.active, .theme6 .filter-tag.active { background: #0f0; color: #000; } .theme6 .stats-row .g-item, .theme6 .stats-row.bottom-row { border-color: #0f0; border-style: dashed; } .theme6 #map-container { background: #000; border: 1px solid #0f0; border-radius: 0; position: relative; z-index: 3; }

themes.name: 7. 机房机架 单列机架+状态横向平铺 (Blade Server Server)
themes.css: body.theme7 { background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #e5e5e5; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .theme7 .grid-container { display: flex !important; flex-direction: column !important; gap: 6px; background: #0a0a0a; padding: 12px; border: 6px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); } .theme7 .vps-card { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr !important; align-items: center !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a3a3a 0%, #2a2a2a 50%, #1f1f1f 100%); border: 1px solid #000; border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 20px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); color: #ddd; } .theme7 .vps-card:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #444 0%, #333 50%, #252525 100%); border-color: #555; } .theme7 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: auto !important; } .theme7 .card-right { border-left: 1px solid #111 !important; padding-left: 20px !important; display: flex !important; flex-direction: row !important; flex-wrap: wrap !important; justify-content: space-between !important; gap: 15px !important; } .theme7 .stat-group { flex: 1 !important; min-width: 110px !important; margin: 0 !important; } .theme7 .stat-header { font-size: 11px; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; } .theme7 .stat-bar-full { height: 8px; border-radius: 1px; background: #111; border: 1px solid #000; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); margin-top: 4px; } .theme7 .stat-subtext, .theme7 .card-meta, .theme7 .ping-box, .theme7 .card-badges { display: none !important; } .theme7 .status-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 8px currentColor; margin-right: 12px; } .theme7 .card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; color: #eee; margin: 0; } .theme7 .group-header { border: none; color: #aaa; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; margin: 20px 0 10px 0; text-align: center; } .theme7 .global-stats { background: #222; border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; padding: 15px; } .theme7 .g-val { color: #10b981; font-family: monospace; font-size: 24px; text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(16,185,129,0.5); } .theme7 .custom-table, .theme7 .filter-tag, .theme7 .view-controls { background: #222; border: 1px solid #333; color: #ddd; border-radius: 4px; } .theme7 .custom-table th { background: #1a1a1a; color: #aaa; border-bottom: 2px solid #333; } .theme7 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a2a; } .theme7 .filter-tag.active, .theme7 .toggle-btn.active { background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; border-color: #3b82f6; }

themes.name: 8. 极光毛玻璃 居中垂直三纹鱼 (Centered Sandwich)
themes.css: body.theme8 { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); background-attachment: fixed; color: #fff; } body.theme8::before { content: ''; position: fixed; top: -50%; left: -50%; width: 200%; height: 200%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,0,128,0.15), transparent 60%); animation: aurora 25s infinite linear; z-index: -1; } @keyframes aurora { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .theme8 .vps-card { flex-direction: column !important; justify-content: center !important; text-align: center !important; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.15); padding: 20px; } .theme8 .vps-card:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); transform: translateY(-3px); } .theme8 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; align-items: center !important; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding-bottom: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .theme8 .card-title { justify-content: center !important; } .theme8 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; } .theme8 .group-header { color: #fff; border-left-color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .theme8 .stat-bar, .theme8 .stat-bar-full { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 8px; } .theme8 .custom-table, .theme8 .filter-tag, .theme8 .view-controls { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 12px; color: #fff; } .theme8 .custom-table th { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); color:#fff; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .theme8 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .theme8 .custom-table tr:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .theme8 .stat-subtext { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } .theme8 .toggle-btn { color: #fff; } .theme8 .toggle-btn.active, .theme8 .filter-tag.active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-color: #fff; } .theme8 #map-container { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 16px; }

themes.name: 9. Notion 黄金比例网格划分 (Asymmetric Golden Split)
themes.css: body.theme9 { background: #ffffff; color: #37352f; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .theme9 .vps-card { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr !important; gap: 20px !important; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e9e9e7; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); padding: 16px; } .theme9 .vps-card:hover { background: #f7f7f5; } .theme9 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: auto !important; } .theme9 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: auto !important; border-left: 2px solid #37352f !important; padding-left: 20px !important; } .theme9 .group-header { border-bottom: 1px solid #e9e9e7; border-left: none; padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.2rem; color: #37352f; } .theme9 .card-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #37352f; } .theme9 .stat-bar-full { height: 6px; background: #e9e9e7; border-radius: 3px; } .theme9 .stat-bar-full > div { background: #37352f !important; border-radius: 3px; } .theme9 .stat-val, .theme9 .g-val { color: #37352f; font-weight: 600; } .theme9 .stat-label, .theme9 .g-label, .theme9 .card-meta, .theme9 .stat-subtext { color: rgba(55,53,47,0.6); } .theme9 .global-stats { background: #f7f7f5; border: 1px solid #e9e9e7; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; } .theme9 .badge { background: #e9e9e7; color: #37352f; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: 500; border: none; padding: 2px 6px; } .theme9 .custom-table { border: 1px solid #e9e9e7; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .theme9 .custom-table th { background: #f7f7f5; color: #37352f; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9e9e7; } .theme9 .filter-tag, .theme9 .view-controls { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e9e9e7; color: #37352f; border-radius: 4px; } .theme9 .filter-tag.active, .theme9 .toggle-btn.active { background: #e9e9e7; color: #37352f; } .theme9 .stats-row .g-item, .theme9 .stats-row.bottom-row { border-color: #e9e9e7; } .theme9 #map-container { border: 1px solid #e9e9e7; border-radius: 4px; }

themes.name: 10. 电子游戏 物理序列强对调 (CSS Order Inversion)
themes.css: body.theme10 { background: #2b2b2b; color: #e8dcc7; font-family: 'Georgia', serif; } .theme10 .vps-card { display: flex !important; background: #3e3832; border: 2px solid #8b6914; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 18px; } .theme10 .vps-card:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); border-color: #daa520; } .theme10 .card-left { order: 2 !important; padding-left: 20px !important; border-left: 1px solid #8b6914 !important; flex: 0 0 180px !important; } .theme10 .card-right { order: 1 !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; flex: 1 !important; padding-right: 20px !important; } .theme10 .group-header { color: #daa520; border-bottom: 2px solid #8b6914; border-left: none; padding-bottom: 5px; text-align: center; font-size: 1.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-top: 30px; } .theme10 .stat-bar-full { height: 14px; background: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #5c4033; } .theme10 .stat-group:nth-child(1) .stat-bar-full > div { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b0000, #ff0000) !important; } .theme10 .stat-group:nth-child(2) .stat-bar-full > div { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00008b, #00bfff) !important; } .theme10 .stat-group:nth-child(3) .stat-bar-full > div { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #006400, #32cd32) !important; } .theme10 .card-title { color: #ffd700; text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px #000; } .theme10 .stat-val, .theme10 .g-val { color: #e8dcc7; } .theme10 .badge { background: #5c4033; border: 1px solid #8b6914; color: #e8dcc7; border-radius: 0; } .theme10 .custom-table, .theme10 .filter-tag, .theme10 .view-controls { background: #3e3832; border: 2px solid #8b6914; color: #e8dcc7; border-radius: 4px; } .theme10 .custom-table th { background: #2b2b2b; color: #daa520; border-bottom: 2px solid #8b6914; } .theme10 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #5c4033; } .theme10 .filter-tag.active, .theme10 .toggle-btn.active { background: #8b6914; color: #fff; border-color: #daa520; } .theme10 #map-container { background: #2b2b2b; border: 2px solid #8b6914; border-radius: 8px; }

themes.name: 11. 二次元 浮动块嵌套+Ping区彻底位移 (Sakura Float Puzzle)
themes.css: body.theme11 { background: url('https://img.api.awsl.cot.me/app/acg') no-repeat center center fixed; background-size: cover; color: #4a4a4a; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS', sans-serif; } .theme11 chart-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .theme11::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); z-index: -1; backdrop-filter: blur(3px); } .theme11 .vps-card { display: block !important; position: relative !important; min-height: 230px !important; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); border: 2px solid rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.6); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.3); padding: 20px; } .theme11 .vps-card:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); border-color: rgba(255, 105, 180, 0.8); transform: scale(1.01) rotate(0.5deg); } .theme11 .card-left { width: 45% !important; float: left !important; margin-bottom: 50px !important; } .theme11 .card-title { color: #ff1493; font-weight: bold; } .theme11 .card-right { width: 50% !important; float: right !important; border-left: none !important; padding-left: 0 !important; margin-bottom: 50px !important; } .theme11 .ping-box { position: absolute !important; bottom: 15px !important; left: 20px !important; width: calc(100% - 40px) !important; margin-top: 0 !important; } .theme11 .group-header { color: #ff69b4; border-left: 5px solid #ff69b4; padding-left: 10px; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.3rem; } .theme11 .stat-bar-full { background: rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.3); border-radius: 10px; } .theme11 .stat-bar-full > div { border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffb6c1, #ff69b4) !important; } .theme11 .badge { background: #ffb6c1; color: #fff; border-radius: 10px; border: none; } .theme11 .custom-table { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); border: 2px solid rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.6); border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; } .theme11 .custom-table th { background: rgba(255,182,193,0.3); color: #ff1493; } .theme11 .filter-tag, .theme11 .view-controls { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); border: 2px solid #ffb6c1; border-radius: 20px; color: #ff69b4; } .theme11 .filter-tag.active, .theme11 .toggle-btn.active { background: #ff69b4; color: #fff; } .theme11 #map-container { border: 2px solid rgba(255, 182, 193, 0.6); border-radius: 20px; }

themes.name: 12. Komari Ran 暖素纸质工艺 (Ran Minimalist Tech)
themes.css: body.theme12 { background-color: #f4efe6 !important; color: #4a443c !important; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .theme12 .vps-card { display: flex !important; flex-direction: column !important; background: #fdfbf7 !important; border: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; border-radius: 12px !important; padding: 20px !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(139,120,90,0.05) !important; } .theme12 .vps-card:hover { border-color: #c4ba9b !important; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(139,120,90,0.1) !important; transform: translateY(-2px); } .theme12 .card-left { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; border-bottom: 2px dashed #e4dec3 !important; padding-bottom: 14px !important; margin-bottom: 14px !important; } .theme12 .card-title { color: #2c2722 !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .theme12 .card-right { flex: none !important; width: 100% !important; padding-left: 0 !important; border-left: none !important; display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr) !important; gap: 12px !important; } .theme12 .card-right > .stat-group { background: #fcf9f2 !important; border: 1px solid #eadecc !important; padding: 10px !important; border-radius: 8px !important; margin-bottom: 0 !important; } .theme12 .card-right > div:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 1 / -1 !important; border-top: 1px dashed #eadecc !important; padding-top: 8px !important; margin-top: 4px !important; } .theme12 .card-right > div:nth-child(5) { grid-column: 1 / -1 !important; background: #f5f0e6 !important; padding: 6px 12px !important; border-radius: 6px !important; border: 1px solid #eadecc !important; } .theme12 .ping-box { background: #f1ebd9 !important; border: 1px solid #e2dac4 !important; border-radius: 6px !important; padding: 8px !important; display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr) !important; gap: 6px !important; margin-top: 12px !important; } .theme12 .stat-bar-full { height: 6px !important; background: #e5dec9 !important; border-radius: 3px !important; } .theme12 .stat-bar-full > div { background: #8b7355 !important; border-radius: 3px !important; } .theme12 .group-header { border-left: 4px solid #8b7355 !important; color: #5a4f43 !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; margin: 24px 0 12px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .theme12 .global-stats { background: #fdfbf7 !important; border: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; border-radius: 14px !important; padding: 24px !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(139,120,90,0.05) !important; } .theme12 .g-val { color: #2c2722 !important; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; } .theme12 .g-label { color: #7a7065 !important; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .theme12 .badge { background: #ede7dc !important; color: #5a4f43 !important; border-radius: 6px !important; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px !important; font-size: 11px !important; border: 1px solid #dcd3c1 !important; } .theme12 .custom-table { background: #fdfbf7 !important; border: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; border-radius: 12px !important; } .theme12 .custom-table th { background: #f4efe6 !important; color: #5a4f43 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; } .theme12 .custom-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #ede7dc !important; color: #4a443c !important; } .theme12 .filter-tag, .theme12 .view-controls { background: #fdfbf7 !important; border: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; color: #5a4f43 !important; border-radius: 8px !important; } .theme12 .filter-tag.active, .theme12 .toggle-btn.active { background: #8b7355 !important; color: #fff !important; border-color: #8b7355 !important; } .theme12 #map-container { background: #faf6ee !important; border: 1px solid #e4dec3 !important; border-radius: 12px !important; }
